summary: KnowER claim review: classified 4 claims about regional infrastructure investment into fact/inference/assumption/rumor with confidence ratings and source quality assessments

claims.text: The county has allocated $12M for downtown renovation in 2026
The renovation will increase commercial occupancy by 30%
unknowns: Baseline occupancy rate not provided in input

claims.text: Local businesses are opposed to the construction timeline
unknowns: No direct business sentiment data in provided input
No survey results or interviews available

claims.text: A competing developer is planning a similar project in the adjacent county
unknowns: Source of claim unknown from provided input

claim_review_data.operator_brief: Of 4 claims reviewed, 1 is confirmed fact (budget allocation), 1 is inference pending verification (occupancy projection), 1 is assumption without evidence (business opposition), and 1 is rumor with no supporting documentation (competing developer). The fact claim is high-confidence with primary source backing. The remaining claims require additional primary source verification before operational decisions.

audit_trail.methodology_notes: Analysis based on provided input text only. No external action taken.

next_steps_recommendation: Route claim review to operator for judgment. No external action needed.
